mapper.insert: insert into forum_post (title, content, category, author_id,create_time,update_time) values (#{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{authorId},#{createTime},#{updateTime})
insert into forum_comment (post_id, content, author_id,create_time) values (#{postId}, #{content}, #{authorId},#{createTime})
mapper.delete:
delete from forum_comment where id in
#{item}
mapper.select: select fp.id, fp.title, fp.content, fp.category, fp.comment_count, fp.author_id, fp.like_count, fp.update_time, u.name as authorName, u.avatar as authorAvatar from forum_post fp left join user u on fp.author_id = u.id where fp.id = #{id}

select fc.content, fc.create_time, fc.author_id, u.name as authorName, u.avatar as authorAvatar, fc.post_id from forum_comment fc left join user u on fc.author_id = u.id where fc.post_id = #{postId} order by create_time asc
select id from forum_comment where post_id = #{postId}
